# HPD.ML.Transforms.BinNormalizeTransform

- Package: `HPD-ML-Transforms` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Transforms`
- Kind: `class`

Assigns values to bins using equal-density (quantile) binning. Output is the bin index normalized to [0, 1].

## Declaration

```csharp
public sealed class BinNormalizeTransform : HPD.ML.Abstractions.ITransform
```
